zh.Kingsdown, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特金斯堂

zh.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: 英國英格蘭肯特金斯堂 聖 約翰
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bona FitzBernard於大約1233年出生在英國英格蘭肯特金斯堂 聖 約翰時，她的父親Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne44歲，母親Joan Aguillon29歲。她於1248年之前與Roger Northwood在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年在她的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.Kingsdown, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特金斯堂

zh-hans.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: 英国英格兰肯特金斯堂 聖 約翰
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bona FitzBernard于大约1233年出生在英国英格兰肯特金斯堂 聖 約翰时，她的父亲Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne44岁，母亲Joan Aguillon29岁。她于1248年之前与Roger Northwood在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1286年在她的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bona
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Bonus ‘good’; a traditional name in the royal house of Savoy, also borne by a Pisan saint ( d. 1207 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Bona FitzBernard was born about 1233, in Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, was 44 and her mother, Joan Aguillon, was 29. She married Roger Northwood before 1248, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1286, in her hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bona FitzBernard est née environ 1233, à Kingsdown St John, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joan Aguillon, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Northwood avant 1248, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1286, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Bona FitzBernard um 1233 in Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne 44 und ihre Mutter Joan Aguillon 29. Sie hat vor 1248 in England Roger Northwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1286 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Bona FitzBernard è nata il circa 1233 nel Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Joan Aguillon, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Roger Northwood prima del 1248, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1286, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bona FitzBernardが約1233年にイギリスイギリスケントキングスダウン スト ジョンで生まれた時，父Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowneは44歳，母Joan Aguillonは29歳であった。1248年以前にイギリスでRoger Northwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그즈다운 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Bona FitzBernard(이)가 대략 1233년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그즈다운 스트 존에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Aguillon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1248년 이전 영국에서 Roger Northwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bona FitzBernard nasceu aproximadamente 1233, em Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Joan Aguillon, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Northwood antes 1248, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1286, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: кингсдоун ст джон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bona FitzBernard родилась около 1233 г. в местности кингсдоун ст джон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Aguillon, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Northwood перед 1248 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1286 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bona FitzBernard nació aproximadamente 1233, en Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Joan Aguillon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Roger Northwood antes de 1248, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1286, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
